response.justification: The candidate is a highly experienced and versatile software engineer, but his background is a significant mismatch for this director-level strategic role. His experience is centered on hands-on implementation and team-level technical excellence, whereas the position requires deep expertise in AI platform strategy, product vision, and customer advisory. His documented AI work is nascent and does not demonstrate the required level of strategic ownership or recognized expertise.
strengths: Over 15 years of broad software development experience
Strong initiative shown through personal projects and open source leadership
Experience with modern cloud and infrastructure tooling (AWS CDK, Kubernetes, Docker)
concerns: Lacks the required director-level strategic experience; background is in senior/staff implementation roles
Insufficient evidence of deep AI expertise or building AI-powered products
No experience in customer/partner advisory or high-level product strategy

key_factors.factor: Mismatch in seniority and strategic scope
